audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds: all three broadcast paths (proposer, reconstruction, block subscriber) publish sidecars to deterministic subnets. Block subscriber path passes sidecar.Index directly instead of computing subnet via ComputeSubnetForDataColumnSidecar, but NumberOfColumns == DataColumnSidecarSubnetCount == 128, so columnIndex % 128 == columnIndex for all valid indices, making the omitted computation a no-op.
